trivia: The A330neo done right: same trusted airframe, new-generation Rolls-Royce engines, and a range boost that made it the default replacement for aging A330ceos, especially on leisure long-haul.
The giveaway is the sharklet: ceo A330s have small canted wingtip fences, neos wear tall curved blades.
funFacts: TAP Air Portugal was the launch operator.
About 25% better fuel burn per seat than early A330s.
